visual: Wide bow stance with arms extended laterally, rear hand forming a hooked 'beak' and front hand pushing outward with palm facing away.
motion_description: Standing with the weight on the right leg, the right arm is held out to the right side at shoulder level with the hand formed into a downward hook. The left leg then steps out laterally to the left while the torso rotates approximately 90 degrees in the same direction. Simultaneously, the left arm pushes outward from the chest to the left side at shoulder height, palm facing away, as the right leg straightens and weight shifts onto the bent left leg to form a wide forward stance. The sequence flows in a slow, steady, and continuous motion.
